title: stachys crispa
intro: Stachys crispa, also known as Puck's Spur or Hedgehog, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, due to its bitter and astringent qualities. The health benefits of Stachys crispa include its ability to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, diarrhea, and nausea, as well as its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. Stachys crispa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused in hot water, or made into a tincture to utilize its medicinal properties effectively.
